records.ety: [L. nominatus, p. p. of nominare to nominate, fr. nomen name. See Name.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Nominated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Nominating (?).]

defs: To mention by name; to name.
quotes: To nominate them all, it is impossible.

defs: To call; to entitle; to denominate.
To set down in express terms; to state.
quotes: Is it so nominated in the bond?

defs: To name, or designate by name, for an office or place; to appoint; esp., to name as a candidate for an election, choice, or appointment; to propose by name, or offer the name of, as a candidate for an office or place.
